title: Portugal Number Seven Fifa 2026 Luxury Football Poster
sourceTitle: Portugal Number Seven Fifa 2026 Luxury Football Poster 2 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed luxury football portrait poster of legendary Portuguese footballer sitting with a determined upward expression, built around geometric cube with the number 7, modern Portugal national team jersey in red and green, and FIFA World Cup 2026 inspired branding with abstract layout graphics. Subject: legendary Portuguese footballer sitting with a determined upward expression appears in a front-facing full-body sports editorial pose with determined upward gaze, realistic skin texture, sharp facial detail, high-detail fabric folds, and elite athlete presence. Scene: Minimal beige textured studio backdrop with clean negative space, subtle vintage paper grain, abstract geometric line graphics, and premium magazine-style sports layout. Composition: Centered symmetrical composition: the athlete sits on the geometric cube, body balanced and upright, red-and-green accents controlled around the subject, with Nike football boots visible in the full-body framing. Signature Elements: Preserved portugal number seven fifa 2026 luxury football poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hyper-real illustration mixed with photorealism, elegant sports editorial design, luxury sports poster finish, cinematic soft studio lighting, GPT image 2 on ChatGPT production quality, FIFA World Cup 2026 inspired branding, and premium magazine aesthetic. Color Palette: Muted beige and paper neutrals with Portugal red and green accents, black boot details, soft skin tones, restrained geometric linework, and subtle vintage texture. Lighting: Cinematic soft studio light, gentle front fill, controlled rim definition, realistic skin highlights, and polished high-detail poster exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
